commit_scope: Add kernel-native HTTP capture rows to model-vitality, a focused Form proof band, and a live Go/Rust native HTTPS probe for public pulse/runtime row evidence.

commands.kernel_scope: 3-kernel only Go/Rust/TypeScript sibling kernels; deterministic no-network grammar proof; fourth-arm external HTTP carrier is a named gap

commands.output: PASS native-http-capture go=127 rust=127 cache=.cache/model-vitality-native-http/20260614T092606Z/native-http-capture-summary.txt; PASS go api_status=200 api_capture_authority=kernel-native-http-get api_bytes=695 api_latency_ms=152 runtime_status=200 runtime_router=native-kernel runtime_handler=api_runtime_endpoints_summary runtime_python_authority=false runtime_latency_ms=77; PASS rust api_status=200 api_capture_authority=kernel-native-http-get api_bytes=695 api_latency_ms=146 runtime_status=200 runtime_router=native-kernel runtime_handler=api_runtime_endpoints_summary runtime_python_authority=false runtime_latency_ms=138; GAP typescript-http-get native-carrier=missing current=culled-shell-projection next=non-shell-node-or-kernel-http-client
commands.kernel_scope: live Go/Rust native http_get over public HTTPS; TypeScript/fourth-arm non-shell external HTTP named as gap

named_gaps: TypeScript http_get currently shells through curl and is not accepted as native HTTPS capture evidence.
Fourth-arm external HTTPS channel support is still absent from this proof.

ci_validation.notes: CI not run yet in this local evidence record.

deploy_validation.notes: Live public endpoints were read by Go/Rust kernel-native http_get. No deploy was performed by this branch yet.

phase_gate.reason: Local deterministic Form proof and live Go/Rust native HTTPS probe passed; PR/CI and deploy catch-up still need to run after push.

evidence_refs: scripts/model_vitality_native_http_capture_probe.sh -> Go/Rust kernel-native http_get public HTTPS witness

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Model-vitality can now represent kernel-native HTTP response dicts as explicit Form capture rows, derive production pulse/runtime rows from live HTTPS responses, and prove public capture through Go/Rust native http_get without curl or Python as the data carrier.
test_flows: Focused deterministic Form band proves native HTTP capture row validation, JSON lifting, case-insensitive header reads, and refusal cases.
Live public probe source-compiles core, invokes Go and Rust kernels, and has each kernel fetch public HTTPS with native http_get.
